missionFrame.function: Solis Terraces loses humidity control and begins shedding heat into an already unstable lattice. Aurelia asks the Eudora Vale to restore the crop climate before a harvest window closes, while Pelagos warns that the requested moisture draw will threaten floating settlements.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: How much immediate food security may one world demand from a system whose old guarantees concealed their cost?

forbiddenOutcomes: end The Broken Accord from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve the lattice burden without authored evidence

phases.title: Solis Terraces
phases.summary: The Eudora Vale reaches Aurelia's climate-controlled grain terraces as humidity collapses, towers shed waste heat, and farm traffic crowds emergency corridors.
objectives: Map immediate crop and worker risk.
Compare Aurelian demand with system consequences.
pressures: Pelagos warns against an unrestricted moisture draw.
phases.directorPurpose: The Eudora Vale reaches Aurelia's climate-controlled grain terraces as humidity collapses, towers shed waste heat, and farm traffic crowds emergency corridors.
playerFacingObjectives: Map immediate crop and worker risk.
Compare Aurelian demand with system consequences.

phases.title: The Towers Fail
phases.summary: Workers, seed vaults, and climate towers require simultaneous rescue while heat and moisture loads move into other parts of the lattice.
objectives: Stabilize enough towers to preserve options.
Prevent heat shed from becoming a Ferrum or Nacre emergency.
pressures: A rapid moisture draw creates a delayed Pelagic surge.
phases.directorPurpose: Workers, seed vaults, and climate towers require simultaneous rescue while heat and moisture loads move into other parts of the lattice.
playerFacingObjectives: Stabilize enough towers to preserve options.
Prevent heat shed from becoming a Ferrum or Nacre emergency.

phases.title: The Cost of Rain
phases.summary: Science, engineering, and local records produce several technically viable rescue allocations with different external costs and confidence levels.
objectives: Establish actual moisture and heat requirements.
Identify who is omitted from the official request.
Prepare a command recommendation with uncertainty.
pressures: Minister Iven wants a decisive answer.
The public model normalizes Aurelian priority.
phases.directorPurpose: Science, engineering, and local records produce several technically viable rescue allocations with different external costs and confidence levels.
playerFacingObjectives: Establish actual moisture and heat requirements.
Identify who is omitted from the official request.
Prepare a command recommendation with uncertainty.

phases.title: Bread and Weather
phases.summary: The acting captain authorizes a crop rescue, partial stabilization, rationed moisture draw, evacuation, or another plan and determines how the intervention will be recorded.
objectives: Account for Pelagos, Ferrum, Nacre, and ship stores.
Set public telemetry and review conditions.
pressures: The visible beneficiary is politically powerful.
The delayed cost may arrive elsewhere after the ship departs.
phases.directorPurpose: The acting captain authorizes a crop rescue, partial stabilization, rationed moisture draw, evacuation, or another plan and determines how the intervention will be recorded.
playerFacingObjectives: Account for Pelagos, Ferrum, Nacre, and ship stores.
Set public telemetry and review conditions.

phases.title: The Harvest Ledger
phases.summary: The mission closes with saved or lost crops, named costs, changed stores, and a public record that shapes later cooperation.
pressures: Aurelia will cite the decision later.
Pelagos and Nacre respond to how costs were acknowledged.
Crew judges whether command made uncertainty visible.
phases.directorPurpose: The mission closes with saved or lost crops, named costs, changed stores, and a public record that shapes later cooperation.

directorFocusRules.summary: Preserve player command agency and accept freeform plans that satisfy visible constraints.
Every technical success moves burden, risk, evidence, or legitimacy somewhere visible.

competencePolicy.playerCompetence: The player character is a trained Starfleet officer. Apply routine competence before asking for checks.
competencePolicy.crewCompetence: Senior staff act professionally within their disciplines and report material risks.

decisionPoints.title: Who Receives the Rain
decisionPoints.prompt: What mix of moisture, heat transfer, local repair, ship fabrication, rationing, and accepted crop loss will the Eudora Vale authorize?

commandDecisions.title: Who Receives the Rain
commandDecisions.summary: What mix of moisture, heat transfer, local repair, ship fabrication, rationing, and accepted crop loss will the Eudora Vale authorize?
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Apply consequences through lattice-integrity, distribution-equity, resource-reserves, public-legitimacy.

outcomeFlags.title: Who Receives the Rain
outcomeFlags.summary: What mix of moisture, heat transfer, local repair, ship fabrication, rationing, and accepted crop loss will the Eudora Vale authorize?

endStates.title: Bread and Weather Complete
endStates.summary: The mission resolves and transitions to chapter-2-the-weight-of-water.

endStates.title: Bread and Weather Transformed
endStates.summary: The mission goal changes under pressure while the campaign continues.
